# Pyodide runtime notice

This directory contains the browser runtime files from **Pyodide 0.29.4**.

- Project: https://github.com/pyodide/pyodide
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/pyodide/v/0.29.4
- License: Mozilla Public License 2.0 (`LICENSE` in this directory)

The files are vendored so the fire-safety assistant can run locally without a
paid API, backend service, or first-launch dependency on a public CDN.
